title: brownfield gap log -- single review artefact per ADR-0007
description: Typed gap entries emitted by the brownfield self-healing retry loop when validators cannot be satisfied after N retries OR when inputs are missing / binary-only. Reviewers read this file as the single artefact representing all documentation gaps. See design/agents/brownfield.md and design/adr/0007-brownfield-auto-mode-self-healing.md.

category.description: Typed reason the doc-generation step could not produce a passing doc. BLOCKED-BY-BINARY: binary input with no source available (e.g., .pbix without PBIP, .msapp without unpack). MISSING-INPUT: expected file absent. INFERENCE-LOW-CONFIDENCE: heuristic inference produced ambiguous output. EXCEEDED-RETRY-LIMIT: N validator retries exhausted; doc written with KNOWN_GAP markers. UNSUPPORTED-PATTERN: no binding matches the artifact type.

artifact.description: Path or identifier of the artefact that could not be documented (e.g., source file path or inventory artifact-id).

artifactType.description: Inventory artifact-type (e.g., 'plugin', 'canvas-app', 'pbi-dataset'). Empty when the gap is at the scan level (no artefact emitted).

reason.description: Short one-line reason. Validators produce this text; do not paraphrase.

whatWouldUnblock.description: One-line hint for the reviewer: what input / source / detail would let the agent finish the doc.

severity.description: blocker = a reviewer must address before downstream agents consume. warning = doc gap; downstream proceeds with entry surfaced. info = acknowledgement (e.g., module detected but no instances of artifact-X).

validatorsFailed.description: Validator names that fired (populated for category=EXCEEDED-RETRY-LIMIT).

retryAttempts.description: How many retry attempts ran before the gap was logged (typically 3 max per project.config.yaml brownfield.retry-limit).

writtenDocPath.description: Path to the doc that was written with KNOWN_GAP markers (populated for category=EXCEEDED-RETRY-LIMIT; empty when no doc was written).

binding.description: Path to the binding YAML used (e.g., templates/bindings/d365-ce/plugin.binding.yaml). Empty when category=UNSUPPORTED-PATTERN.
